summary: Comprehensive test of Mira soul memory features per Bible documents. Backend tests 9/9 PASSED. Mira correctly remembers pet's allergies (Mojo has chicken allergy), uses temperament and personality data, and references learned_facts. Mobile UI (iOS 390x844, Android 360x800) works correctly with no overflow issues.

issues: Multiple onboarding modals (Location, Chat/Services explanation, Test Scenarios) may stack and require multiple dismissals - could be streamlined

critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: Lines 12417-12441 in mira_routes.py correctly fetch pet_context from DB when not provided in request. This ensures Mira always has access to pet's soul data.
Allergy handling is comprehensive - food_safety_gate() function at line 242 merges allergies from 7+ sources including doggy_soul_answers.food_allergies
mira_soulful_brain.py correctly builds pet context string with all doggy_soul_answers fields (lines 650-750)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - Mobile UI works, minor UX improvement possible for onboarding flow

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (Mojo with pet-mojo-7327ad56)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira soul memory is working correctly. Test pet: Mojo (id=pet-mojo-7327ad56) has chicken allergy in doggy_soul_answers.food_allergies, 78% soul_score, 7 learned_facts. When asking about chicken treats, Mira correctly refuses and suggests alternatives. Mobile UI at iOS (390x844) and Android (360x800) has no overflow issues but shows multiple onboarding modals for first-time users.

features_verified.mira_knows_pet_allergies: PASS - Asked about chicken treats for Mojo, Mira correctly identified and refused due to chicken allergy
features_verified.mira_uses_temperament: PASS - Mira describes Mojo as friendly, playful, high energy from soul profile
features_verified.mira_uses_learned_facts: PASS - Mojo has 7 learned_facts including 'Loves: salmon treats', 'Prefers: morning walks'
features_verified.pet_context_fetch_from_db: PASS - When pet_context not provided in request, mira_routes.py fetches from DB (lines 12417-12441)
features_verified.ios_mobile_390x844: PASS - No horizontal overflow, all UI elements accessible
features_verified.android_mobile_360x800: PASS - No horizontal overflow, all UI elements accessible
features_verified.today_panel: PASS - TODAY tab visible and clickable, shows relevant content
features_verified.picks_panel: PASS - Chat responses include pillar detection and picks suggestions
features_verified.soul_score_display: PASS - 78% soul score displayed for Mojo

key_test_scenarios_executed: Asked Mira: 'Can you recommend chicken treats for Mojo?' - Mira refused and explained allergy
Asked Mira: 'Tell me about Mojo's personality' - Mira described temperament, energy level, social behavior
Asked Mira: 'What allergies does Mojo have?' - Mira correctly identified chicken allergy
Verified pet API returns soul data including doggy_soul_answers.food_allergies = 'chicken'
Verified mobile UI on iOS 390x844 and Android 360x800 viewports - no overflow
